name: digital-compass-mcp
description: Digital Compass MCP — digital-crisis playbooks as tools for AI agents in 9 languages (ro original; en/hu Romania-anchored; pl/cs/sk/it/fr/de country-anchored with local reporting channels): match a user's situation to a step-by-step playbook, fetch full guidance as markdown, list real reporting channels per country. Public-good content, CC BY 4.0, plain language.
